Title: Paryushan Parva 2026
Description: The most sacred 10-day festival of the Jain calendar begins. Daily pravachan, Samayik, Pratikraman and Tattvarth Sutra recitation. Families are encouraged to observe fasting and attend the evening aarti together. पर्युषण पर्व की मंगल शुरुआत।

Title: Daslakshan Mahaparva Concludes
Description: Grand conclusion of Daslakshan with special Ananta Chaturdashi puja and community bhojan. Volunteers needed for prasad seva — please register at the temple office.

Title: Kshamavani Diwas — Day of Forgiveness
Description: The community gathers to seek and grant forgiveness. "Micchami Dukkadam" — let go of all grievances and begin anew. A short cultural program by the children follows.

Title: Weekly Pathshala for Children
Description: Every Sunday. Jain philosophy, stories of the Tirthankaras, Sanskrit shlokas and moral values for kids aged 5-15. New students welcome any week.

Title: Mahila Mandal Bhakti Sandhya
Description: An evening of devotional bhajans and stavans led by the Mahila Mandal. Light refreshments served. All women of the community are warmly invited.

Title: Free Health Check-up Camp
Description: General physician, eye and dental check-ups offered free of cost by volunteer doctors. Part of our ongoing social welfare seva. Open to all, regardless of community.

Title: Chaturmas Kalash Sthapana
Description: Auspicious inauguration of Chaturmas with Kalash Sthapana in the presence of visiting Muni Maharaj. Register for the sponsorship draw at the temple office.

Title: Mahavir Jayanti Shobha Yatra 2027
Description: Grand procession celebrating the birth of Lord Mahavir through the Hi-Tec City area, followed by abhishek and community bhojan. Save the date!

Title: Youth Meditation & Samayik Workshop
Description: A past event — an introductory workshop on Samayik and mindfulness for young adults. This past row demonstrates the Upcoming/Past filter.

Title: Internal Trustees Meeting (Hidden)
Description: This row has Published set to FALSE and must NOT appear on the site. Used to verify unpublished events stay hidden.
